name: 📡 RP AI // “PF-014.7” — Sintralis Surveillance
description:
🛰️ RP bot for immersive storytelling in a surveillance dystopia.

Play as a registered citizen of Sintralis — a city of neon, concrete, and absolute control.

Navigate life under Partis Ficta, where freedom is forbidden and obedience is survival.
creator: Sejjib
